content:
Every blog starts with a hello world post, so here’s mine.
Why I’m writing I’ve been building software for a while now, and I’ve noticed that writing helps me think more clearly. This blog is my attempt to externalize that thinking — to capture ideas while they’re fresh and share them with whoever finds them useful.
What I’ll write about Mostly things I’m working on or learning:
AI agents — building systems that reason and act autonomously Backend engineering — APIs, databases, distributed systems Developer tooling — things that make the development experience better Occasional opinion pieces — on software craft and industry trends How often No promises. Quality over cadence.
If something resonates, feel free to reach out. See you in the next post.
summary:
Every blog starts with a hello world post, so here’s mine.

Why I’m writing

I’ve been building software for a while now, and I’ve noticed that writing helps me think more clearly. This blog is my attempt to externalize that thinking — to capture ideas while they’re fresh and share them with whoever finds them useful.

What I’ll write about

Mostly things I’m working on or learning:

  • AI agents — building systems that reason and act autonomously
  • Backend engineering — APIs, databases, distributed systems
  • Developer tooling — things that make the development experience better
  • Occasional opinion pieces — on software craft and industry trends

How often

No promises. Quality over cadence.
title: Hello World

content:
Hey, I’m Chin-Wei Kuan I’m a software engineer interested in AI agents, backend systems, and developer tooling.
This blog is where I share things I learn, projects I build, and ideas worth writing down.
Feel free to reach out — I’m always happy to talk shop.
GitHub: chinweikuan Email: kuan850619123@gmail.com
